title: Gantt Chart Percentages Complete
excerpt: Is it possible to show percentage complete next to tasks, groups or the overall project on a gantt chart?

posts.author: mharding7va (Michael Harding)
posts.cookedHtml: Is it possible to show percentage complete next to tasks, groups or the overall project on a gantt chart?

posts.author: toallenlinksquares (Tom Allen)
posts.cookedHtml: This is a project management 101 feature and should be something monday.com supports.

posts.author: Mark.A (Mark Antonello)
posts.cookedHtml: Guessing there is no progress in this area? Difficult to accept a project management tool does not have this feature.
